title: Native desktop apps
description:
GUI client for macOS, Windows, and Linux — installable without a terminal.

Required:
- Framework decision: Tauri (Rust backend + webview) is the leading candidate; avoids duplicating nie-core logic
- nie-core compiled as a native library, called from the Tauri backend
- Screens: chat room, contacts/online list, wallet (balance, send, receive), settings
- System tray integration with unread message badge
- Native notifications for incoming messages
- Key backup UI: display seed phrase / QR code, import from backup file
- Auto-update mechanism
- Signed installers for macOS (.dmg) and Windows (.msi); AppImage/deb/rpm for Linux
close_reason: Tauri 2 desktop skeleton complete: init_identity, connect_relay, send_chat commands; nie://message event loop; HTML chat UI; 3 tests pass; cargo check clean
